title: Brightness Aura
body:
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brightness-aura) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth%20•%20Profile-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=black)](https://modrinth.com/user/PrincParshia) > **NOTE**: Please prefer downloading [Anemos](https://modrinth.com/mod/anemos) instead for more features.
## 📗 DESCRIPTION This mod gives you true fullbright by overriding Minecraft’s brightness cap (raised from 100 to 1500). It removes all darkness and shadows, making everything fully lit — regardless of time, biome, or dimension. ## 🧩 USAGE * Press `B` to toggle between max brightness and previous brightness. > To configure transitions, use the `/brightaura` command: > * `/brightaura transition ` — enable or disable transition > * `/brightaura transition_time ` — set the duration of the transition in ticks (e.g. 20 = 1 second)
